titleStmt.title: SII 22.296: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 296. (A.R. No. 296 of 1906) NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT, WALAJAPET TALUK, TIRUMĀLPURAM. MAṆIKAṆṬHĒŚVARA TEMPLE—ON THE NORTH WALL OF THE FIRST PRĀKĀRA. KULŌTTUṄGA-CHŌḶA I—12th YEAR (A.D. 1080-81)

summary.p: This is built in at the right end. It begins with the introduction Pugaḻsūḻnda puṇari etc. It records a gift of 90 sheep for burning a perpetual lamp in the temple at Tirumālpēṟu, by one Malaitāṅgi Dēvaṉ Sūryaṉ alias Rājēndraśōḻa-Mummalairājaṉ of Neḍi-nāḍu, a division of Perumbāṇappāḍi.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . pukaḻ cūḻn=ta puṇari Akaḻ cūḻn=ta puviyil poṉṉemi Aḷavun taṉneminaṭappa viḷaṅku jayamakaḷai yiḷaṅkopparuvattuc cakkarakoṭ ṭattu vikkiramat toḻilāl putumaṇam puṇarntu matuvaraiyiṭṭam vayirākarattu vār Ayil Iḷaikkun=taḷava taḷamiriya vāḷuṟaikaḻittut toḷvali kāṭṭip porppari naṭātti kirttiyai niṟutti vaṭaticai vākaicūṭit
tait temarukamalappūmakaḷ potumaiyum poṉ niyāṭai naṉnilappāvai tanimai[ yun=ta] virntup punitaṟ ṟirumaṇimakuṭam Urimaiyiṟ cūṭit taṉnaṭi yiraṇṭu n=taṭamuṭiyākat toṉnilaventar cūṭa muṉṉai manuvāṟu perukki kaliyāṟu vaṟuppac ceṅkol ticaitoṟuñ cella veṇkuṭai yirunilaviḷākam meṅka ṇun=tanatu tirunala veṇṇilāt tikaḻa Orutani
ppuli viḷaiyāṭa pārkaṭaṟṟivān=tarattu muvar tiṟaiviṭu taṟa kalañcori kaḷiṟumuṟai niṟpa vilaṅkiya teṉṉavaṉ karun=talai parun=talaittiṭat taṉ poṉṉakarp puṟattiṭaikkiṭappa viṉṉāṇ piṟkulappiṟaipol niṟpiḻaiyeneṉuñ colletir koṭiṟṟallatu taṉ kaivil letirkoṭā vikkalaṉ kallatar naṅkili tuṭaṅki maṇalūr naṭuveṉat tuṅkapat
vum Eṅkaṇum paṭṭa veṅkaḷiṟiṭṭa n=taṉmānamuṅ kūṟiya viramum kiṭappa Eṟiṉa malaikaḷum mutuku neḷitara Iḻin=ta natikaḷuñ cuḻaṉṟuṭain=toṭik kiṭan=ta kaṭalu n=talaivirittalamarak kuṭaticait taṉnāḷukan=ta tāṉun=tāṉaiyum paṉnāḷiṭṭa palpala mutukum pattaitikkoṭi jayapperun=tiruvum paḻiyukantu koṭutta pukaḻiṉ celvamum vāḷāviṭṭa maṭa
ṭṭamu miḷātu koṭutta veṅkariñiraiyuṅ kaṅkamaṇṭalamuñ ciṅkaṇa meṉṉum paraṇiyiraṇṭum Orumaiyil kaikkoṇṭāramu n=tiruppuyallaṅkalum peruviramu n=tiyākamum viḷaṅkap pārmicai mevalar vaṇaṅka viṟṟirun=taruḷiya korājakecaripanmarāna Uṭaiyār śrīkulottuṅkacoḻadevarkku yāṇṭu 21Āvatu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻama
parumpāṇappāṭi neṭināṭṭu malaitāṅki neṭunāṭuṭaiyāṉ tevaṉ cūriyaṉāna rājentracoḻa mummalairājaṉ Uṭaiyār tirumālpeṟu paṭārarkku tattārkkut tiruviḷakku Oṉṟu Itu can=tirātittaval tirunon=tāviḷakku Eriya meṟpaṭiyār viṭṭa cāvāmuvāperāṭu toṇṇūṟu Ivvāṭu toṇṇūṟuṅ kaikkoṇṭu nicati Uḻakku ney te
vaṭikaḷ tirumālpeṟuṭaiyāṉākam maṉṟāṭi coṭṭai tevaṉ Aṭṭuvā rākavum Ivarkaḷ ḷivvūriruntu Iṉ ney yaṭṭāte Acalūrilirukkiṉ Inney taṇṭa ponārkku coṟumiṭṭu tāṅkaḷ kaṭava ney yaṭṭuvatākak kaikkoṇṭa cāvā muvāp perāṭu toṇṇūṟu Ittanmam panmāheśvararakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 22.296 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
